tagline: Your pool should be an oasis where great memories with family and friends are made year-round.

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves a Five-Star Touch
hero.subheadline: For 17 years, Stanton Pools has been the most trusted name in pool care across Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, and the Conejo Valley. From weekly maintenance to stunning remodels, we back every job with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee and $0 upfront.
checkmarks: $0 upfront — pay only when you're thrilled

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly upkeep to complete transformations, our specialized team members handle each trade so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete renovations including plaster resurfacing, tile and coping upgrades, copper-to-PVC plumbing conversions, and equipment relocation.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly cleaning with chemical balancing, skimmer and pump basket service, equipment checks, vacuuming, and wall brushing.

cards.title: Spa Additions
cards.description: Custom-designed spa features that complement your existing pool, transforming your backyard into a complete heated oasis.

cards.title: Structural Crack Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and lasting repair of structural cracks in pool shells, restoring integrity and stopping water loss.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Pump, heater, and saltwater system repair plus energy-efficient variable-speed pump installation and Wi-Fi remote setup.

cards.title: Specialized Pool Care
cards.description: Advanced services including saltwater conversions, heater servicing, smart automation systems, and energy-efficiency upgrades.

steps.title: Book Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll schedule a convenient time to inspect your pool and discuss your goals — no pressure, no cost.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Eric and the team will walk you through a tailored proposal with transparent pricing. Remember: $0 due upfront on any project.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Oasis
steps.description: We handle every detail while you relax. Your satisfaction is guaranteed — if you're not happy, we make it right.

about.label: About Stanton Pools
about.headline: 17 Years of Trust, One Pool at a Time
about.description: Founded by Eric Stanton in 2008, Stanton Pools has grown into one of the most respected pool service companies in Ventura and Los Angeles Counties. Our team is trained by a certified Health Department technician, and we have specialized crew members for each trade — making us a true one-stop shop. With Contractor License #1009474, full bonding and insurance, and over 250 five-star reviews, we've earned the trust of families across the Conejo, Simi, and San Fernando Valleys.

features.title: Owner-Operated Excellence
features.description: Eric Stanton is personally involved in every project, ensuring the same high standards from consultation through completion.

features.title: Dedicated Trade Specialists
features.description: Each crew member specializes in a specific trade — plumbing, electrical, surfacing — so you get expert quality without juggling contractors.

features.title: Risk-Free Trial
features.description: Try our weekly maintenance service with zero obligation. No contracts, no cancellation fees — we earn your business every visit.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, Zero Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote comes with clear, upfront pricing — no hidden fees. And with our $0 upfront structure, you don't pay until the work is done and you're completely satisfied.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every job we do. If you're not completely thrilled with our work, we'll make it right — period. With $0 due upfront on any project, the risk is entirely on us. That's the Stanton Pools promise, and it's why over 250 families have trusted us with five-star reviews.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Southern California?
faqs.answer: We serve Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Woodland Hills, West Hills, North Hollywood, Newbury Park, Tarzana, Simi Valley, Encino, Calabasas, Chatsworth, Agoura Hills, Oak Park, Sherman Oaks, Studio City, Granada Hills, and Canoga Park — covering Ventura and Los Angeles Counties including the Conejo, Simi, and San Fernando Valleys.

faqs.question: Do I really pay $0 upfront?
faqs.answer: Yes. We don't collect payment until the work is complete and you're fully satisfied. This applies to both maintenance services and remodeling projects. It's our way of putting your trust first.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our entire team is trained by a certified Health Department technician, and we hold Contractor License #1009474. We're fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool remodel take?
faqs.answer: Most remodels take between 2 to 4 weeks depending on the scope. During your free evaluation, Eric will walk you through a realistic timeline and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Can I try your maintenance service before committing?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a risk-free trial for new weekly maintenance customers. Experience our service firsthand with zero obligation — we're confident you'll want to stay.

testimonials.name: David W.
testimonials.text: If Yelp had the ability to give 10 stars, that is what I would give Stanton Pools. The entire remodel was flawless from start to finish.
testimonials.context: Woodland Hills, CA — Complete Pool Remodel

testimonials.name: Andrea B.
testimonials.text: I HIGHLY recommend Eric and his team. All the plumbing, electrical, and surface needed to be redone — and they handled every bit of it beautifully.
testimonials.context: Sherman Oaks, CA — Full 1960s Pool Renovation

testimonials.name: Jaimee W.
testimonials.text: Hiring Eric Stanton was one of the best decisions I have ever made for my home. His honesty and craftsmanship are unmatched.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get your free, no-obligation pool evaluation today. Call us or fill out the form and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.description: Stanton Pools has served Thousand Oaks and the greater Southern California area since 2008. Licensed (Contractor #1009474), bonded, and insured — we're your trusted partner for every pool need.
footer.service_area: Serving Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Woodland Hills, Simi Valley, Encino, Calabasas, Agoura Hills, Sherman Oaks, and surrounding communities in Ventura & Los Angeles Counties.
